testsuite.name: me.owldev.adsignage.domain.assignment.DeviceRestaurantControllerTest

testcase.name: PATCH returns 404 when device id is unknown()
PATCH returns 404 when restaurant id is unknown()
PATCH on never-assigned device returns 200 and inserts a new active row()
PATCH remaps existing device and returns 200 with new active assignment()
PATCH returns 400 when restaurantId is blank()
